framework.name: Claude Code
framework.description: Master-loop architecture — single-threaded while-loop agent (nO engine) with tool orchestration, subagent dispatch, h2A real-time steering, context compaction (wU2), and progressive disclosure skills. Built by Anthropic as a CLI coding agent.

modules.name: nO Master Loop
modules.description: Single-threaded while-loop: while(tool_calls exist) → execute tool → feed results → model decides next action. Terminates when model produces plain text without tool calls.

modules.name: h2A Steering Queue
modules.description: Async dual-buffer queue for real-time user intervention. Inject new instructions mid-task without restarting. Esc to stop, type correction + Enter to queue.

modules.name: Tool Engine & Scheduler
modules.description: Orchestrates 18+ tools: Read/Edit/Write (files), Grep/Glob (regex search, no vector DBs), Bash (universal adapter), WebSearch/WebFetch, ToolSearch (dynamic discovery), Agent/Skill/TaskCreate (orchestration).

modules.name: wU2 Context Compressor
modules.description: Auto-triggers at ~92% context utilization. Clears old tool outputs, summarizes conversation, moves key info to long-term memory. Maintains prefix cache stability.

modules.name: Subagent Dispatcher
modules.description: Spawns typed subagents (Explore, Plan, general-purpose) with fresh uncorrelated context windows. Up to 16 concurrent, 1000 per run. Strict depth limits — subagents cannot spawn sub-subagents.

modules.name: Memory System
modules.description: Markdown-based long-term storage: CLAUDE.md (project rules), MEMORY.md (persistent facts). No vector DBs — prioritizes reliability and debuggability over semantic search.

modules.name: Planning System
modules.description: EnterPlanMode → explore codebase → design approach → user approval → execute. Plan-first approach boosts success rate 2-3x. TodoWrite tracks structured task lists with dependencies.

modules.name: Skill Loader
modules.description: Progressive disclosure: only name + description in context (~tens of tokens). Full instructions load on demand when skill is invoked. Enables dozens of workflows without context explosion.

modules.name: Permission Gate
modules.description: 5-tier permission system: Manual → Accept Edits → Plan → Auto → Bypass. Risk-level classification on Bash commands, injection filtering, checkpoint snapshots before every file edit.

modules.name: StreamGen Output
modules.description: Streaming output generator. Formats tool results, renders interactive todo lists, displays diffs. Delivers real-time feedback to CLI/TUI/VS Code/Web UI.

metadata.description: nO loop detects tool_call in model response → dispatches to Tool Engine; result flows back
Before each turn, nO checks h2A queue for user-injected corrections or redirections
At ~92% utilization, nO triggers wU2 to summarize old turns, free context space
nO spawns typed subagents for parallel exploration; summarized results return to main context
Read CLAUDE.md/MEMORY.md at session start; write important facts for persistence across sessions
User requests plan mode → explore codebase → propose plan → approved → execute tasks
When skill name matches, Skill Loader injects full skill instructions into context
Before Bash/file edit, Tool Engine passes command through Permission Gate for risk assessment
Subagent results are summarized before injection into main context to prevent pollution
nO streams tool outputs and final response through StreamGen to user-facing UI
Loaded skill instructions benefit from prefix caching for subsequent invocations
Esc key signal flows through h2A → Tool Engine cancels running tool call immediately
Plan phase spawns Explore subagents to read files across codebase in parallel
Every file edit is snapshotted before modification, enabling undo/revert

phases.name: Context Loading & Warm-Up
phases.description: Load CLAUDE.md, MEMORY.md, resolve project rules; warm prefix cache with tool specs and subagent prompts

steps.description: Read CLAUDE.md (~20K+ tokens of project rules) and MEMORY.md (persistent facts)
Register available skills by name + description only (~tens of tokens each until invoked)
Prime subagent system prompts into prefix cache for faster subsequent spawns

phases.name: Master Agent Loop (nO)
phases.description: while(tool_calls): gather context → take action → verify results. Model decides each next step autonomously.

steps.description: nO receives task, appends to conversation history
Before each turn, check h2A queue for user-injected steering commands
Search codebase with regex (Grep), read relevant files (Glob/Read) — no vector DBs
If user requests plan mode: explore → propose → await approval → execute
Spawn Explore subagents with fresh contexts for broad codebase sweeps
Surgical diffs (Edit) to files; Bash for build/test/lint commands
At ~92% context: summarize old turns, free space for new work
Stream final answer to user; if no more tool calls, loop terminates naturally

phases.name: Session Persistence
phases.description: Save key findings to MEMORY.md, snapshot state for next session

steps.description: Write important facts and decisions to MEMORY.md for cross-session recall
Clear the interrupt queue; session ends
